Fannie Mae: Mortgage rates predicted to end 2025 at 6.6 % but remain volatile.
Canadian PPI MoM Actual 1.6% (Forecast 0.8%, Previous 0.2%)

Elanco introduces Pet Protect supplements for pets, aiming to tap into the growing US pet supplement market. Aims to offer proactive wellness solutions for cats and dogs with a comprehensive line of products.
news.summary: Pet Protect is a company that provides a range of vet-formulated supplements supported by science. The pet supplement market in the U.S. is expanding due to the rising demand from pet owners for proactive health solutions. Pet Protect offers a variety of products for dogs and cats, specifically focusing on joint health.

news.headline: Trump pledges Fort Knox gold audit; Odds on Polymarket for audit before May soar to over 70% as President plans to check gold reserves.
news.summary: The chances of a Fort Knox gold audit occurring before May have risen to over 70% on Polymarket. This increase came after US President Donald Trump announced intentions to verify the gold reserves held at the facility.

news.headline: Japan's BNPL market to hit US$20.11 billion in 2025 with 33.7% annual growth, achieving 55.9% CAGR during 2021-2024.
news.summary: The newest report on Japan's Buy Now Pay Later industry reveals promising opportunities for business and investment. According to the report, the BNPL payment market in Japan is projected to see a significant 33.7% annual growth, reaching an estimated US$20.11 billion by 2025. Between 2021 and 2024, the market experienced strong expansion with a remarkable compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 55.9%. This data, including over 75 key performance indicators covering market size, end-use sectors, market share, product analysis, business models, and demographics, is now available for interested parties.

news.headline: HUB Cyber Security resolves $16.6M legacy liabilities with Oppenheimer & Dominion, secures $13.5M financing, strengthening financials.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on February 20, 2025, HUB Cyber Security Ltd. (NASDAQ: HUBC), a key player in confidential computing and advanced data fabric technology, announced successful resolutions with Oppenheimer & Co. Inc. and Dominion Capital, wiping out $9.1 million in old debts. The Company managed to trim down total claims of $16.6 million to a final sum of $7.5 million through advantageous installment arrangements. This move has notably bolstered HUB's financial position and flexibility.

news.headline: P2P.org Exec hails Ethereum's Pectra upgrade as ‘huge’ for staking with fewer validators to cut costs and automatic rewards for simpler operations.
news.summary: According to Artemiy Parshakov from P2P.org, reducing the number of validators can result in cost savings. Implementing automatic rewards can also streamline operations, making the process simpler and more efficient.

news.headline: Ignite Summit 2025 schedule released by the Apache Software Foundation, overseen by the Ignite PMC. Global virtual conference.
news.summary: The annual Ignite Summit 2025, sponsored by the Apache Software Foundation and managed by the Ignite Project Management Committee (PMC), has released its conference schedule on Feb. 20, 2025 in Foster City, California. The summit serves as the premier global virtual conference for all individuals...

news.headline: 13.5M US households rent single-family homes, 75% interested in smart solutions - Parks Associates study.
news.summary: A recent study revealed that over 75% of individuals renting single-family homes are interested in smart solutions provided by the property. The research conducted by Parks Associates in Dallas examined the connectivity and smart home preferences of single-family renters. This indicates a significant demand for innovative technology among this demographic.

news.headline: Chairman Ziv Dekel of BOS Better Online Solutions Ltd. passes away after a long illness. - 9412 characters
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Rishon Le Zion, Israel, BOS Better Online Solutions Ltd. (NASDAQ: BOSC) announced the unfortunate passing of its Chairman, Mr. Ziv Dekel, following a prolonged illness. The Board of Directors is currently searching for a new Chairman, and further updates will be shared in the future.

news.headline: ImmuCell to reveal Q4 & full-year 2024 unaudited financial results on Feb 26, 2025, at 9:00 AM ET in conference call.
news.summary: On Wednesday, February 26, 2025, a conference call is set to take place at 9:00 AM Eastern Time. The call is scheduled to discuss important matters with key individuals involved. This event marks a crucial moment in coordinating efforts and sharing information among participants. It serves as an opportunity to address significant issues and ensure all stakeholders are informed and aligned. Participants are expected to dial in promptly for the start of the call to facilitate a productive discussion.

news.headline: LangChain releases LangMem SDK for AI, allowing agents to use long-term memory for better learning, personalization, and adaptation.
news.summary: LangChain has recently launched the LangMem SDK, which empowers AI agents to leverage long-term memory for better learning and personalization, consequently boosting adaptive agent functionalities. This development is significant in the realm of AI technology as it facilitates the utilization of past information for improved performance.

news.headline: Talus utilizes Sui blockchain, launching Nexus AI framework with Idol.fun on Walrus for decentralized storage.
news.summary: Talus has collaborated with Sui blockchain to introduce the Nexus AI framework and Idol.fun platform, utilizing Walrus for decentralized storage. This partnership aims to improve onchain AI agent functionalities.

news.headline: Character.AI launches Chat Styles feature for custom user experiences. Pick from Meow, Roar, or Nyan for tailored interactions.
news.summary: Character.AI has introduced a new Chat Styles feature, offering users the ability to customize interactions with beloved characters. With options like Meow, Roar, or Nyan styles, users can select personalized experiences. For more information, visit the platform.

news.headline: Cambridge medical startup SurgiBox gets US patents for core technology, aims to revolutionize mobile surgery.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts on February 20, 2025, SurgiBox Inc., a medical device startup, has secured two United States Patents for its core technology. The company's flagship product, SurgiField™, is designed to transform mobile surgery. This development marks a significant milestone for SurgiBox Inc. and highlights their commitment to innovation in the medical field.

news.headline: Biofidelity to debut Enspyre technology at AGBT 2025, promising higher sensitivity variant calling with less data.
news.summary: Biofidelity, a prominent provider of innovative genomic solutions, has introduced Enspyre, a cutting-edge next generation sequencing (NGS) preparation technology. This technology allows for a significant increase in sensitivity for variant calling, all while utilizing only a fraction of the data typically required. The company made this announcement from both Cambridge, England, and Research Triangle Park, N.C. on February 20, 2025. This advancement is anticipated to have a major impact on genomic research and analysis, offering higher accuracy and efficiency in identifying variants.

news.headline: Walmart's Q4 FY25 sales reach $180.55 billion, beating estimates, but FY26 outlook is disappointing.
news.summary: Walmart Inc's (NYSE:WMT) stock is down in premarket trading, following the release of their fourth-quarter FY25 financial results. The company achieved a 4.1% year-on-year sales growth, reaching $180.55 billion, surpassing analysts' expectations of $180.01 billion. Adjusted earnings per share (EPS) for the quarter were reported at 66 cents, higher than the estimated 64 cents. The gross margin rate rose by 53 basis points, attributed to Walmart U.S., with operating income up by $0.6 billion (8.3% increase) and adjusted operating income up by 9.4% due to increased gross margins and membership income growth. Additionally, global eCommerce sales saw a substantial 16% increase, notably from store fulfillment for pickups and deliveries.

news.headline: Biotricity reports record margins, revenues, and cashflows with 21.7% YoY sales growth for Q3 fiscal 2025.
news.summary: Biotricity Inc., based in Redwood City, California, revealed its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025, concluding on December 31, 2024. Known for its innovative remote monitoring and diagnostic services, the Technology-as-a-Service (TaaS) provider showcased its latest results. The company, traded as OTCQB: BTCY, continues to redefine the healthcare sector with cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: Greystone Housing Impact Investors LP reveals Q4 2024 and annual 2024 financial results ended Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: Greystone Housing Impact Investors LP (NYSE: GHI) disclosed its financial outcomes for the three months and full year concluding on December 31, 2024, in a recent statement released on February 20, 2025, in Omaha, Nebraska.

news.headline: Luca Mining Corp reports 7.9m intersection of 5.87g/t AuEq at Tahuehueto Mine, marking a significant discovery.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 20, 2025, Luca Mining Corp. ("Luca" or the "Company") shared positive news regarding their exploration efforts. They disclosed results from the initial four (4) underground diamond drill holes as part of a continuous 5,000 meter ("m") exploration drill initiative. Luca trades on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol LUCA, on the OTCQX as LUCMF, and on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange as Z68.

news.headline: Atreon Orthopedics launches BioCharge Autobiologic Matrix after FDA clearance; aims to enhance tendon healing with new technology.
news.summary: A new groundbreaking medical device, the BioCharge implant, has been developed by Atreon Orthopedics, LLC in Columbus, Ohio. This implant is a fully resorbable synthetic scaffold aiming to enhance tendon healing. It promises to revolutionize treatment with a simpler surgical procedure. The innovative product was launched on February 20, 2025, in Dublin, Ohio. This development marks a significant advancement in medical technology and is expected to improve the healing of tendons in patients.

news.headline: Trump suggests sharing Elon Musk’s cost-cutting savings with taxpayers, potentially fueling inflation concerns.
news.summary: President Trump proposed the idea of distributing a portion of the savings generated by Elon Musk's cost-cutting efforts to taxpayers as a way to potentially ignite inflation.

news.headline: PRA Group and StepChange collaborate in UK Parliament to aid debt relief. NORFOLK, Va., Feb. 20, 2025 - Global leader PRA Group (Nasdaq: PRAA) and StepChange join forces to support debt-ridden individuals.
news.summary: The financial industry has united to provide assistance to individuals struggling with debt in Norfolk, Virginia. On February 20, 2025, PRA Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: PRAA), a prominent player in acquiring and managing nonperforming loans globally, joined forces with StepChange, the UK's primary debt advice charity. This collaboration aims to offer practical solutions to individuals facing financial challenges. The partnership showcases the commitment of both organizations to support those in need, with PRA Group, Inc. bringing its expertise in managing nonperforming loans and StepChange providing essential debt advice services. This initiative highlights the proactive approach of the financial sector in addressing the prevalent issue of debt, emphasizing a collective effort to assist individuals in improving their financial well-being.

news.headline: Trump pledges audit of Fort Knox gold, prediction markets show over 70% chance before May on Polymarket after his confirmation.
news.summary: The chances of a Fort Knox audit taking place before May are now over 70% according to Polymarket, following an announcement by Donald Trump regarding the intention to verify the gold reserves held there.

news.headline: US Steel Maker Gerdau may increase usage of US plants due to steel tariffs
Nam Tai Property secured a RMB 110.0 million loan from Shenzhen Rural Commercial Bank at an all-in rate of 4.4% per year.
news.summary: Nam Tai Property Inc. (OTC Expert Market: NTPIF) in Shenzhen, China, has closed a mortgage loan with Shenzhen Rural Commercial Bank (SRCB) totaling RMB 110.0 million. The loan has an eight-year maturity period with a blended all-in rate of approximately 4.4% annually, based on the Loan Prime Rate published by the Central Bank of the People’s Republic of China. The loan is secured by the company's property known as Inno.

news.headline: Cancer Check Labs expands early cancer detection testing to PA, MD, and RI, detecting tumor-based cancers as early as Stage 0.
news.summary: A groundbreaking blood test for detecting tumor-based cancers at Stage 0 is now accessible to a wider range of patients. Cancer Check Labs, renowned for its early cancer detection services, has extended its reach to include Pennsylvania, Maryland, and Rhode Island. The expansion, launched on Feb. 20, 2025, marks a significant milestone in providing more individuals with access to this innovative technology.

news.headline: "BCH Miner offers free AI cloud mining service for global users to access Bitcoin, Litecoin, Dogecoin. Simple, secure, and efficient platform."
news.summary: BCH Miner, based in Seattle, WA, launched an AI cloud mining service allowing users to mine popular cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Litecoin, and Dogecoin. This platform aims to simplify digital currency mining for investors without requiring expensive hardware or deep technical knowledge. BCH Miner touts advantages such as efficient and intelligent mining with optimized algorithms, a user-friendly interface for easy operation, and platform security measures for protecting user accounts and funds. The service provides industry-leading mining benefits, making it accessible for both new and experienced users.

news.headline: The Freedom Bank of Virginia partners with Apiture for digital banking platform conversion.
news.summary: In Wilmington, North Carolina, Apiture revealed that The Freedom Bank of Virginia has transitioned its online and mobile banking services to Apiture's Digital Banking Platform.

news.headline: By the end of 2025, over 150MW of power capacity is expected in New Zealand's data center market; analysis on 30 existing and 7 upcoming data centers across various cities.
news.summary: Dublin-based ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently added the "New Zealand Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" database to their offering. This database focuses on analyzing the New Zealand data center market portfolio, delivering detailed insights on 30 existing data centers and 7 upcoming data centers. The covered locations include Auckland, Hamilton, Wellington, Christchurch, Palmerston North, among others. This database provides crucial information for colocation data centers in the region, offering comprehensive insights for market analysis and strategic decision-making.

news.headline: Royal Canin donates meals for nearly one million pets in need as of 2024. Celebrates National Love Your Pet Day.
news.summary: A notable pet health nutrition brand, Royal Canin, based in St. Charles, Mo., disclosed on Feb. 20, 2025, via PRNewswire, that they have rendered aid by delivering meals for almost one million pets in distress in North America. This brand, a prominent player in the pet health nutrition sector and part of the Mars, Incorporated conglomerate worth billions, has shown its commitment towards helping pets in need by providing a substantial amount of meals across the continent.

news.headline: URLgenius had a successful year in 2024, generating $5 billion in social commerce revenue, a 53% increase YoY. New features and innovations drove rapid growth with client-created links rising by 575% YoY.
news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin, URLgenius, a prominent app-linking platform, experienced significant growth and advancement in the year 2024. The company achieved a remarkable milestone by generating over $5 billion in social commerce revenue, marking a 53% increase compared to the previous year. This success can be attributed to the introduction of innovative features such as Multi-link Composer, Instant App Linking, and Trending Links which led to rapid advancements within the platform. The speed of value delivery was exceptional, evidenced by a substantial 575% increase in client-created links year-over-year, resulting in a 161% rise in commerce creators on the platform.

news.headline: Novavax (Nasdaq: NVAX) to discuss Q4 and full year 2024 results on Feb 27, 2025 at 8:30 a.m. in Md., per PRNewswire.
news.summary: Novavax, Inc., a leading global company developing protein-based vaccines with its Matrix-M™ adjuvant, is set to disclose its financial performance and operational achievements for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on February 20, 2025. The announcement is scheduled for 8:30 a.m. and will be shared with the public. Novavax, Inc. is listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol NVAX.

news.headline: Cordial hires Rob Garf as SVP of Strategy and Insights to accelerate AI innovation for enterprise retail marketing. SAN DIEGO, Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: Rob Garf has been appointed as the Senior Vice President of Strategy and Insights at Cordial, a prominent enterprise retail marketing messaging leader based in San Diego. The announcement was made on February 20, 2025. Garf's role will primarily focus on accelerating AI innovation and assisting customers in maximizing their return on investment. Cordial is known for its advanced technology and expertise in catering to enterprise retail marketing teams, with a strong emphasis on delivering impactful messaging solutions. This strategic hire showcases the company’s commitment to enhancing its capabilities and driving growth in the industry.

news.headline: Trulieve is opening a new dispensary in Columbus, Ohio with a grand opening on Feb 21. Leading cannabis company.
news.summary: A new Trulieve Cannabis Corp. location in Franklin County is set to have its grand opening celebration on Friday, February 21st in Tallahassee, Florida. Trulieve is known as a top performer in the American cannabis industry, with the company trading as CSE: TRUL and OTCQX: TCNNF. The event marks a significant milestone for the company and the local community.

news.headline: MicroCloud Hologram Inc. in China develops Local Quantum Coherence for Quantum Phase Transition in multi-model systems.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on February 20, 2025, MicroCloud Hologram Inc. (NASDAQ: HOLO) announced its focus on the relationship between local quantum coherence (LQC) and quantum phase transition (QPT). As a technology service provider, the company specializes in this area, aiming to provide innovative solutions.

news.headline: Ukrainian nonprofit partners with Dog Tag Inc. to release Ukrainian prisoners of war through Taste of Freedom project.
news.summary: The Taste of Freedom project aims to raise awareness and support for Ukrainian prisoners by selling award-winning desserts made from a recipe crafted by a Ukrainian veteran. This initiative seeks to highlight stories of bravery and perseverance from the prisoners while promoting their release. The project, based in Washington, is set to utilize the proceeds from these dessert sales to further enhance backing for the cause.

news.headline: Northwestern Mutual achieves $40B surplus, sets records, pays record dividend in transformative 2024.
news.summary: In 2024, a company based in Milwaukee experienced unprecedented success, achieving record levels in surplus and revenue. The company expanded its network of financial advisors and representatives at an unparalleled rate. Additionally, it announced a historic dividend payout to policyowners. Impressively, the company managed to uphold the highest financial strength ratings available.

news.headline: Myris Therapeutics develops ultra-high DAR ADCs for precision cancer treatments with ratios of 50 - 100.
news.summary: Myris Therapeutics has recently come out of hiding to unveil their updated name and revised strategy. The company's exclusive polymer chemistry allows for incredibly high drug to antibody ratios ranging from 50 to 100, thus providing a unique chemical environment for precise targeted Antibody-Drug Conjugates (ADC) payloads. This announcement was made in Pittsburgh on February 20, 2025.

news.headline: Neuberger Berman launches NB Private Markets Academy to meet demand for private markets education.
news.summary: A private, independent investment manager, Neuberger Berman, headquartered in New York, revealed on February 20, 2025, the introduction of the NB Private Markets Academy. This novel initiative aims to provide education and support to financial advisors and investors in managing their investments effectively.

news.headline: GTCR closes Strategic Growth Fund II with $3.6 billion in commitments after initiating fundraising in fall 2024.
news.summary: In Chicago on February 20, 2025, GTCR, a prominent private equity firm, revealed the successful completion of fundraising for Strategic Growth Fund II ("SGF II" or the "Fund"), amassing roughly $3.6 billion in total commitments. The fundraising process began in the autumn of 2024 and the Fund was oversubscribed, reflecting significant investor interest.

news.headline: AEH Group partners with VitalEdge Technologies to implement e-Emphasys platform for digital transformation.
news.summary: In Cary, North Carolina, on February 20, 2025, VitalEdge Technologies, a top player in enterprise software solutions for heavy equipment and rental sectors, revealed a partnership with Agricultural Equipment Holdings (AEH Group), a key player in agricultural machinery. This collaboration is anticipated to enhance productivity and efficiency in the industry, benefiting a wide range of clients.

news.headline: Nature's Way launches an 'Innovation Challenge' for health breakthroughs. Seeking ideas for gut health and weight support.Characters: 104
news.summary: A prominent company in the vitamins and supplements sector located in GREEN BAY, Wis., has announced a call for innovative proposals from scientists to revolutionize gut health and weight management wellness support. Nature's Way is seeking pioneering concepts to influence the future in this field. The announcement was made on February 20, 2025, and Nature's Way is renowned for its position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: SOBR Safe and Orbiit partner for AI wearables in alcohol recovery, revolutionizing technology. (characters: 93)
news.summary: In Denver on February 20, 2025, SOBR Safe, Inc. (NASDAQ: SOBR), a prominent company in advanced alcohol detection technology, and Orbiit, a cutting-edge alcohol recovery platform powered by artificial intelligence, have revealed a groundbreaking strategic AI collaboration. This partnership marks the first of its kind for both companies and is set to significantly transform the approach to alcohol-related issues.
